seo.defaultDescription: Edgelink Inc. is a team-first wireless retail family bringing reliable Metro by T-Mobile service and real careers to neighborhoods across Arkansas, Connecticut, Massachusetts, Rhode Island, and Tennessee.

hero.headline: Connecting communities to what matters most.
hero.subhead: From New England to the South, Edgelink Inc. is a team-first retail family bringing reliable wireless service and real careers to every neighborhood we serve.

about.headline: A retail family built on opportunity.
paragraphs: Edgelink Inc. is an authorized Metro by T-Mobile dealer headquartered in Warwick, Rhode Island. What started as a handful of stores has grown into a multi-state team united by one simple idea: take care of your people, and they'll take care of everyone else.
We're a team-first company that promotes from within, celebrates results, and treats every store like it matters — because every store does.
about.quote: We don't just sell wireless. We invest in people, communities, and the careers that grow from them.

services.headline: Wireless retail, done right.
services.lead: We operate authorized Metro by T-Mobile retail stores across five states. Our work is community connection, neighborhood-level service, and building careers from the ground up.

items.title: Retail Operations
items.description: We run 35+ neighborhood stores across Arkansas, Connecticut, Massachusetts, Rhode Island, and Tennessee — each one staffed by local team members who know their community.

items.title: Customer-First Service
items.description: Bilingual support, transparent guidance, and reps who take the time to understand what each customer actually needs. No scripts, no pressure.

items.title: Career Development
items.description: Every coach and manager started where you'd start. We promote from within because we'd rather build talent than rent it.

values.headline: Our values, not slogans.
values.lead: Four things shape every decision we make, every store we open, and every person we hire.

items.label: People First
items.title: We invest in our team.
items.description: Real training, real mentorship, real paths to grow. Our team is the company.

items.label: Community Rooted
items.title: We live where we work.
items.description: Our stores aren't outposts. They're neighborhood fixtures staffed by local people.

items.label: Growth From Within
items.title: We promote our own.
items.description: 100% of our coaches and managers came up through the company. That's the path we offer everyone.

items.label: One Team
items.title: We win together.
items.description: No silos, no politics. Across five states and 35+ stores, we operate as one family.

locations.headline: Five states. One family.
locations.lead: From the Smoky Mountains to New England's coast, our stores are where neighbors connect.

careersCallout.headline: Build a career, not just a job.
careersCallout.description: We're hiring Retail Sales Representatives across all five states. Bilingual welcome. No wireless experience required — we'll teach you everything.

contactForm.headline: We'd love to hear from you.
contactForm.lead: Questions, feedback, or career inquiries — drop us a message and we'll get back to you.
contactForm.successMessage: Thanks! We got your message and will reply soon.

news.headline: What's happening at Edgelink.
news.lead: Company updates, hiring events, team milestones, and more.

items.title: Now Hiring Across All 5 States
items.summary: We're actively hiring Retail Sales Reps in Arkansas, Connecticut, Massachusetts, Rhode Island, and Tennessee. Bilingual candidates encouraged to apply.

hero.headline: Where your next chapter starts.
hero.subhead: Real training, real growth, real people. Whether you're new to retail or coming in with experience, Edgelink is built to help you go further.

whyEdgelink.headline: More than a job. A real career path.
whyEdgelink.lead: We hire for energy and attitude, not resumes. The rest we teach.

items.title: 100% Promote From Within
items.description: Every coach, every manager started where you'd start. The path is real and proven.

items.title: Paid Training
items.description: No wireless experience? No problem. We pay you to learn from day one.

items.title: Family-Owned
items.description: You're not a number. You're part of a team that knows your name and roots for you.

items.title: Bilingual Welcomed
items.description: Spanish-speaking team members thrive here. Our customers reflect our communities.

growthPath.headline: Start as an RSR. Lead a region.
growthPath.lead: This isn't theoretical. Every step on this path is held by someone who started as an RSR.

steps.title: Retail Sales Rep
steps.subtitle: Where everyone starts
steps.description: Learn the products, serve customers, and earn from day one with base + commission.

steps.title: Senior RSR
steps.subtitle: Trusted leader on the floor
steps.description: Take on training duties, mentor new reps, and earn more responsibility and pay.

steps.title: Store Manager
steps.subtitle: Run your own store
steps.description: Full P&L responsibility, team building, and manager bonus eligibility.

steps.title: Coach
steps.subtitle: Lead a group of reps
steps.description: Drive performance across multiple reps. Coaching payouts on top of base.

benefits.headline: The whole package.
benefits.lead: Beyond pay, here's what comes with the role.

applicationProcess.headline: Four steps. That's it.
applicationProcess.lead: We've made this simple on purpose. From application to first day, here's what happens.

steps.title: Apply Online
steps.description: Click the Apply button. Fill out a quick application through Paychex Flex — it takes about 10 minutes.

steps.title: Background Check
steps.description: Once we review your application, we'll send a Clear Verification background check. Standard step, no surprises.

steps.title: Offer Letter
steps.description: Pass the background check and we'll send your official offer letter outlining role, pay, and start date.

steps.title: Onboarding
steps.description: Welcome to the team. Paid training begins, and you'll be assigned a coach and home store.

items.quote: I started as an RSR two years ago. Today I run my own store. That doesn't happen everywhere.
items.name: Team Member

items.quote: The training is real. My coach checks in every week. I've never worked somewhere that actually invests in me like this.
items.name: Team Member

items.quote: Bilingual customers feel at home here. So do bilingual employees. The culture is everything.
items.name: Team Member

applyCta.headline: Your future starts here.
applyCta.description: Click below to view current openings on our Paychex Flex careers portal. We're hiring across all five states — find the role that fits and apply today.

faq.headline: Got questions? We've got answers.
faq.lead: Everything you need to know before applying.

items.question: Do I need wireless experience to apply?
items.answer: No. We provide paid training from day one. We hire for energy and attitude, not experience. If you can connect with customers and want to learn, we'll teach you everything else.

items.question: Is the role bilingual?
items.answer: Bilingual candidates (especially Spanish-speaking) are strongly encouraged to apply. Our customer base reflects the diverse communities we serve, and bilingual team members thrive here. English-only candidates are also welcomed.

items.question: What's the pay structure?
items.answer: Base pay plus commission, with additional bonus opportunities including spiffs, accessory bonuses, and performance bonuses. Coaches and managers have additional earning paths.

items.question: What does the application process look like?
items.answer: Four steps: 1) Apply online via our Paychex Flex portal (~10 min), 2) We send a Clear Verification background check, 3) Once cleared, you'll receive an official offer letter, 4) Paid training begins and you'll be assigned a coach and home store.

items.question: How long does the application process take?
items.answer: Typically 1-2 weeks from application to start date, depending on background check turnaround and your availability.

items.question: Can I grow into management?
items.answer: Yes — 100% of our coaches and store managers started as Retail Sales Reps. We promote from within. The path is RSR → Senior RSR → Coach → Store Manager.

items.question: What are the hours like?
items.answer: Retail hours, including some evenings and weekends. Schedules are built around your availability. We aim for a healthy work-life balance.

items.question: Where are you hiring?
items.answer: We have 35+ stores across Arkansas, Connecticut, Massachusetts, Rhode Island, and Tennessee. The application form lets you select your preferred location.

openPositions.headline: Current openings.
openPositions.lead: Find a role that fits — filter by state to see what's open near you.
openPositions.noJobsMessage: We don't have any openings posted right now, but we're always growing. Check back soon or submit a general application.

items.title: Retail Sales Representative
items.description: Join Edgelink Inc. as a Retail Sales Representative at our Bald Hill store in Warwick, RI. You'll connect with customers, help them find the right Metro by T-Mobile plans and devices, and grow your career with a team that promotes from within.
responsibilities: Greet customers, identify their needs, and recommend the right plans and devices
Process activations, upgrades, and accessory sales
Maintain store cleanliness and product displays
Meet individual and team sales targets
Provide excellent bilingual customer service (where applicable)
requirements: Strong communication and customer service skills
Flexible availability including evenings and weekends
benefits: Employee discount on Metro by T-Mobile service
Real career path — 100% promote from within

footer.tagline: An authorized Metro by T-Mobile retailer connecting communities across Arkansas, Connecticut, Massachusetts, Rhode Island, and Tennessee.
